As a ready to move property, buyers can immediately shift in without the hassle of waiting for possession or additional construction. The peaceful atmosphere and well maintained surroundings make it an appealing choice for homeowners and investors alike.::::Locality::Located in Kattupakkam, Chennai, this property enjoys the benefits of a well developed residential area with excellent connectivity. resultList.dtldesc: Own a piece of sophistication with this 2 BHK Flat available for sale in the prestigious Anuttara Apartment, Vandalur, Chennai. Offering freehold ownership rights, this meticulously designed relatively new property offers spacious interiors, elegant finishes, and ample natural light to create a warm and inviting atmosphere. So get ready to make this beautifully crafted home yours and experience a lifestyle of comfort, convenience, and class in the heart of Vandalur.Property Specifications Impeccably crafted, this well-ventilated and naturally bright space is constructed over a carpet area of 952 sq. ft. and is located on the second floor of a four-storeyed building. The Vastu-compliant flat is designed with simplicity and elegance, offering an open and inviting living environment. Adorned with vitrified tiles for the flooring, this flat features two well-sized bedrooms, each designed for comfort. There are also 2 western bathrooms of which one is an attached bathroom, while the second bathroom serves as a common facility. Both bathrooms come with modern western fittings and geyser points, ensuring convenience and comfort. Additionally, there is a living-cum-dining area and a balcony attached to the hall offers an inviting view of the surrounding area, providing a peaceful escape. To make cooking enjoyable, the kitchen is ready with a granite platform and a stainless steel sink.Facilities The flat is equipped with essential amenities for modern living. It comes with covered parking, ensuring secure and convenient parking for your vehicle. The building provides an unrestricted water supply, along with a 100 power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort. The security guard and CCTV surveillance provide peace of mind, while the lift adds to the convenience of the residents. Locality This apartment is situated just under 2km away from the Kilambakkam Bus Stand, the flat enjoys excellent connectivity to various parts of Chennai. Public transport options are readily available, with the Vandalur Railway Station located 3.5 km away and the Kilambakkam Metro Station just 2 km from the property, making commuting effortless. Prominent schools and well-known hospitals are within a kilometer, providing easy access to education and healthcare. For shopping and leisure, malls and supermarkets are nearby, while banks and ATM centers ensure all your financial needs are met.
